command: docker run --detach --name op-bench-pytorch__140557__layer_norm_decomp_precision-63c85c262cdc --label op-bench.environment-id=pytorch-cpu-torch2.6.0-py311 --label op-bench.managed=true --label op-bench.runtime-tier=cpu_python_overlay --label op-bench.task-id=pytorch__140557__layer_norm_decomp_precision --volume /data/op_bench_workspaces/op-bench-pytorch__140557__layer_norm_decomp_precision-63c85c262cdc:/workspace --workdir /workspace op-bench/pytorch-cpu:torch2.6.0-py311 tail -f /dev/null
docker exec --workdir /tmp op-bench-pytorch__140557__layer_norm_decomp_precision-63c85c262cdc python -c 'import torch; print(torch.__version__); print(torch.__file__)'

docker exec --workdir /workspace op-bench-pytorch__140557__layer_norm_decomp_precision-63c85c262cdc python -c 'import hashlib
import importlib
import json
import os
import pathlib
import shutil
import site
import sys

cfg = json.loads(sys.argv[1])
workspace = pathlib.Path(cfg["workspace_dir"])
runtime_site_packages = pathlib.Path(cfg["runtime_site_packages"])
package = cfg["installed_package"]
overlay_paths = cfg["overlay_paths"]

runtime_site_packages.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
os.chdir("/tmp")

module = importlib.import_module(package)
package_source = pathlib.Path(module.__file__).resolve().parent
package_destination = runtime_site_packages / package.split(".")[0]
if not package_destination.exists():
    shutil.copytree(package_source, package_destination, symlinks=True)

package_libs_source = package_source.parent / f"{package.split('"'"'.'"'"')[0]}.libs"
package_libs_destination = runtime_site_packages / package_libs_source.name
if package_libs_source.exists() and not package_libs_destination.exists():
    shutil.copytree(package_libs_source, package_libs_destination, symlinks=True)

pth_line = "import sys; sys.path.insert(0, {!r})\n".format(str(runtime_site_packages))
for site_packages in site.getsitepackages():
    site_packages_path = pathlib.Path(site_packages)
    if site_packages_path.exists():
        (site_packages_path / "op_bench_runtime_overlay.pth").write_text(pth_line, encoding="utf-8")

synced = []
for relative in overlay_paths:
    relative_path = pathlib.PurePosixPath(relative)
    if relative_path.is_absolute() or ".." in relative_path.parts:
        raise ValueError(f"invalid overlay path: {relative}")
    source = workspace / pathlib.Path(*relative_path.parts)
    destination = runtime_site_packages / pathlib.Path(*relative_path.parts)
    destination.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    shutil.copy2(source, destination)
    digest = hashlib.sha256(destination.read_bytes()).hexdigest()
    synced.append({"workspace": str(source), "runtime": str(destination), "sha256": f"sha256:{digest}"})

print(json.dumps({"mode": "python_overlay", "package": package, "overlay_files": synced}, sort_keys=True))' '{"installed_package": "torch", "overlay_paths": ["torch/_refs/__init__.py"], "runtime_site_packages": "/tmp/op_bench_runtime/site-packages", "workspace_dir": "/workspace"}'

package_libs_source = package_source.parent / f"{package.split('"'"'.'"'"')[0]}.libs"
package_libs_destination = runtime_site_packages / package_libs_source.name
if package_libs_source.exists() and not package_libs_destination.exists():
    shutil.copytree(package_libs_source, package_libs_destination, symlinks=True)

pth_line = "import sys; sys.path.insert(0, {!r})\n".format(str(runtime_site_packages))
for site_packages in site.getsitepackages():
    site_packages_path = pathlib.Path(site_packages)

        (site_packages_path / "op_bench_runtime_overlay.pth").write_text(pth_line, encoding="utf-8")

synced = []

    relative_path = pathlib.PurePosixPath(relative)

        raise ValueError(f"invalid overlay path: {relative}")

    shutil.copy2(source, destination)

    synced.append({"workspace": str(source), "runtime": str(destination), "sha256": f"sha256:{digest}"})

docker exec --workdir /workspace op-bench-pytorch__129138__linear_add_bias_autocast-b7af50937a4a python -c 'import hashlib
import importlib
import json
import os
import pathlib
import shutil
import site
import sys

cfg = json.loads(sys.argv[1])
workspace = pathlib.Path(cfg["workspace_dir"])
runtime_site_packages = pathlib.Path(cfg["runtime_site_packages"])
package = cfg["installed_package"]
overlay_paths = cfg["overlay_paths"]

runtime_site_packages.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
os.chdir("/tmp")

module = importlib.import_module(package)
package_source = pathlib.Path(module.__file__).resolve().parent
package_destination = runtime_site_packages / package.split(".")[0]
if not package_destination.exists():
    shutil.copytree(package_source, package_destination, symlinks=True)

package_libs_source = package_source.parent / f"{package.split('"'"'.'"'"')[0]}.libs"
package_libs_destination = runtime_site_packages / package_libs_source.name
if package_libs_source.exists() and not package_libs_destination.exists():
    shutil.copytree(package_libs_source, package_libs_destination, symlinks=True)

pth_line = "import sys; sys.path.insert(0, {!r})\n".format(str(runtime_site_packages))
for site_packages in site.getsitepackages():
    site_packages_path = pathlib.Path(site_packages)
    if site_packages_path.exists():
        (site_packages_path / "op_bench_runtime_overlay.pth").write_text(pth_line, encoding="utf-8")

synced = []
for relative in overlay_paths:
    relative_path = pathlib.PurePosixPath(relative)
    if relative_path.is_absolute() or ".." in relative_path.parts:
        raise ValueError(f"invalid overlay path: {relative}")
    source = workspace / pathlib.Path(*relative_path.parts)
    destination = runtime_site_packages / pathlib.Path(*relative_path.parts)
    destination.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    shutil.copy2(source, destination)
    digest = hashlib.sha256(destination.read_bytes()).hexdigest()
    synced.append({"workspace": str(source), "runtime": str(destination), "sha256": f"sha256:{digest}"})

print(json.dumps({"mode": "python_overlay", "package": package, "overlay_files": synced}, sort_keys=True))' '{"installed_package": "torch", "overlay_paths": ["torch/_inductor/fx_passes/mkldnn_fusion.py"], "runtime_site_packages": "/tmp/op_bench_runtime/site-packages", "workspace_dir": "/workspace"}'
